title: Vadeshwaram Temple
tagline: Vadeshwaram Temple — spiritual town of Kerala

overview.short: Vadeshwaram Temple is a Shiva temple located at Aroli in the Kannur district of Kerala, India.
overview.description: Vadeshwaram Temple is a Shiva temple located at Aroli in the Kannur district of Kerala, India. Vadeshwaram is one among the 108 ancient Shiva temples in Kerala. It is also well known amongst the numerous Shiva temples in South India. It is built on top of a hill that looks like a mountain and is hence known by the nickname 'Kailasa of North Malabar'.

routes.byAir: Fly to nearest airport + road transfer
Fly to nearest airport + road transfer

howToReach.roadNote: Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

topPlaces.name: Kalliasseri
topPlaces.description: Kalliasseri is a census town in Kannur district in the Indian state of Kerala. Kalliaseri Panchayat comprises two villages: Kalliasseri and Irinave.

topPlaces.name: Anchampeedika, Kannur
topPlaces.description: Anchampeedika is a town in the Kannur district of the North Malabar region in the Indian state of Kerala. Anchampeedika is located roughly 13.5 km from the Kannur Corporation, and it is adjacent to the Taliparamba municipality.

topPlaces.name: Pappinisseri
topPlaces.description: Pappinisseri is a census town in Kannur district in the Indian state of Kerala. Pappinissery have consistently won the Swaraj Trophy for best Grama Panchayat from 2017-2018 to 2021.

topPlaces.name: Morazha
topPlaces.description: Morazha is a village of Anthoor Municipality in Kannur district in the Indian state of Kerala. Before formation of Anthoor Municipality this village was part of Thaliparamba Municipality.

topPlaces.name: Kattampally
topPlaces.description: Kattampally is a village located in the eastern part of Kannur district, Kerala on the Valapattanam River. The nearest towns are Puthiyatheru and Kambil.

topPlaces.name: Dharmashala, Kannur
topPlaces.description: Dharmashala is a town and headquarters of the Anthoor Municipality in Kannur district of the North Malabar region in the Indian Indian state of Kerala, near National Highway 66 between Kannur and Taliparamba about 16 kilometres (9.9 mi) north of Kannur.

topPlaces.name: Anthoor
topPlaces.description: Anthoor (IPA: [aːn̪t̪uːr]) is a municipality, in Taliparamba taluk of the Kannur district in Kerala, India. The municipality had a population of 28,218 in the 2011 Indian census.

topPlaces.name: Punnakkulangara
topPlaces.description: Punnakkulangara is a significant part as well as a Municipal Ward of Anthoor Municipality in Kannur district of Kerala, India.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Vadeshwaram Temple?
faq.a: The best time to visit Vadeshwaram Temple is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Vadeshwaram Temple?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Calicut International Airport, Kozhikode (113 km) and the nearest railway station is Mangaluru Central (115 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Vadeshwaram Temple?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Vadeshwaram Temple at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Vadeshwaram Temple?
faq.a: Stays in Vadeshwaram Temple start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Vadeshwaram Temple?
faq.a: The top attractions are Kalliasseri, Anchampeedika, Kannur, Pappinisseri, Morazha, Kattampally.
